hero_subtitle: SFTY helps public authorities link Travel Rule data with wallet transactions and KYT signals to monitor international digital asset flows and preserve evidence for case review.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Supervision gaps slow cross-border flow review
problem_description: Regulators struggle to trace and assess digital asset movements when Travel Rule data and transaction monitoring remain disconnected across borders. This fragmentation delays risk detection, complicates case evidence collection and weakens supervisory responsiveness.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY aggregates Travel Rule messages, transaction risk signals, wallet activity and provider outputs into one evidence-ready supervisory workflow that supports regulator review, case management and reporting across jurisdictions.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to supervisory action
workflow_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule message data, exception handling, wallet risk signals and KYT alerts into structured cases, evidence collection and regulatory actions.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. A supervisory control plane
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented market data, Travel Rule messages, KYT signals, cases and evidence into one secure supervisory layer for structured regulatory oversight.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY provides regulators with secure deployment, evidence-grade logging and access governance to support controlled oversight of cross-border digital asset flows and supervisory cases.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help monitor cross-border Travel Rule flows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how wallet and transaction risk connect to supervision
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence-grade logging supports Travel Rule case reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe multi-provider orchestration for regulatory transaction monitoring
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for regulators supervising digital assets?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a supervisory layer that connects VASP data, transactions, KYT signals, Travel Rule messages, and cases into one secure environment for regulators overseeing digital asset activity.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support cross-border flow monitoring?
faq_2_answer: SFTY enables market-level oversight by linking cross-border wallet activity, transaction flows, Travel Rule data and risk signals to support risk detection and supervisory workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve evidence for cases?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and all supporting evidence to support audit-ready supervisory records for investigation and reporting purposes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing supervisory tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY can integrate multiple KYT, KYC, Travel Rule and analytics providers while supporting secure deployment and role-based access within existing government infrastructures.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing analytics or compliance tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements and connects existing analytics and compliance tools without replacing them, providing a connected, evidence-grade supervisory layer above fragmented data sources.
final_title: Review supervisory control of cross-border flows
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects Travel Rule, wallet activity and KYT signals into structured supervisory cases and evidence packages.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
